title: selaginella macrathera
intro: Selaginella macrathera, also known as Spikemoss or Resurrection Plant, is a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and can be found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which are believed to help treat a range of health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Selaginella macrathera include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is believed to provide a range of health benefits and is used to treat various health conditions.
